front.title: Active Operations, Administration, and Maintenance (OAM) for Service Function Chaining (SFC)

abstract.t: A set of requirements for active Operations, Administration, and Maintenance (OAM) for Service Function Chaining (SFC) in a network is presented in this document. Based on these requirements, an encapsulation of active OAM messages in SFC and a mechanism to detect and localize defects are described.
